steps.title: Trace what this refers to
steps.content: The phrase This quality points back to Gatsby's resourcefulness of movement, described as peculiarly American. In context, the word names a trait or feature that keeps showing through his manner.

steps.title: Separate traits from status
steps.content: Choice A would mean a level of excellence, not the movement trait being described. Choice B means social prestige. Choice D means an achievement, but Gatsby's movement is an ongoing feature, not a completed feat. The answer is C.
